emails.subject: Re: National Bank of Canada
emails.body: Re: National Bank of Canada Swap away! Chris Gaffney 04/17/2001 09:18 AM

emails.subject: Re: National Bank of Canada
emails.body: Re: National Bank of Canada Swap away! Chris Gaffney 04/17/2001 09:18 AM

emails.subject: National Bank of Canada
emails.body: Tana It has been some time since we have spoken/emailed/voice mailed How y'all doing? Things are good in Toronto now that winter is almost over. Will you help me out with something? I need to know if we are able to do a power swap under the ECT ISDA with National Bank of Canada. I looked it up on the database and do not see any restrictions but I wanted to make sure. See you in San Antonio. CJG
